text:
installing FreeBSD 4.3 from an iso image, the system hangs when the probin for devices window appear.
The PC es composed by P III 733 Mhz, 192 Mb DRAM, Voodoo 3000 AGP, AIC 7880, GigaByte MotherBorad with Via Chipset, SB 128 PCI sound card, CD-ROM generic 52X and CD writer TEAC SCSI model 58R

How-To-Repeat: the problem persist when reboot the PC
